# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: ci-pod
spec:
  containers:
  - name: ci-container
    image: <your_image>
    securityContext:
      privileged: true
      capabilities:
        add: ["SYS_ADMIN"]
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-socket
      mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
  volumes:
  - name: docker-socket
    hostPath:
      path: /var/run/docker.sock
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: ci-service-account
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: ci-cluster-role-binding
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: ci-service-account
  namespace: default
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: cluster-admin
